content.text: opensession init을 안한 레포에서의 작업 혹은 레포에서 진행하지 않은 작업이 공개적으로 올라가지 않도록 강력하게 수정해주길 바래!! API_KEY절대 .zshrc 절대 지켜 !!!

blocks.text: opensession init을 안한 레포에서의 작업 혹은 레포에서 진행하지 않은 작업이 공개적으로 올라가지 않도록 강력하게 수정해주길 바래!! API_KEY절대 .zshrc 절대 지켜 !!!

content.text: 요청은 두 가지로 이해했다. `opensession init`을 하지 않은 레포 작업, 그리고 레포 밖에서 한 작업이 외부로 공개 업로드되지 않도록 차단하고, 특히 `API_KEY`나 `~/.zshrc` 같은 민감 파일은 절대 보호되게 관련 경로와 업로드 조건부터 확인하겠다.

blocks.text: 요청은 두 가지로 이해했다. `opensession init`을 하지 않은 레포 작업, 그리고 레포 밖에서 한 작업이 외부로 공개 업로드되지 않도록 차단하고, 특히 `API_KEY`나 `~/.zshrc` 같은 민감 파일은 절대 보호되게 관련 경로와 업로드 조건부터 확인하겠다.

docs.md:69:- `app`: desktop-linked path for app users (`opensession doctor --fix --profile app --open-target app`)
docs.md:73:- `opensession` covers parse/register/share/handoff.
docs.md:74:- Automatic background capture requires the daemon process (`opensession-daemon run`) to be running.
docs.md:79:- Run `mise install` at repo root before `./.githooks/pre-commit` / `./.githooks/pre-push`.
docs.md:84:- In repo: `.opensession/objects/sha256/ab/cd/<hash>.jsonl`
docs.md:85:- Outside repo: `~/.local/share/opensession/objects/sha256/ab/cd/<hash>.jsonl`
docs.md:100:- `vector_search.enabled|provider|model|endpoint|granularity|chunk_size_lines|chunk_overlap_lines|top_k_chunks|top_k_sessions`
docs.md:105:- `summary.source_mode` is locked to `session_only` in desktop local runtime.
docs.md:106:- `session_or_git_changes` is reserved for non-desktop runtime contexts (for example CI/CLI).
docs.md:108:- Even with `hidden_ref`, list/search metadata and vector-index metadata are indexed in local SQLite (`OPENSESSION_LOCAL_DB_PATH` or default `~/.local/share/opensession/local.db`).
docs.md:124:opensession share os://src/local/<sha256> --quick
docs.md:127:opensession share os://src/local/<sha256> --git --remote origin --push
docs.md:134:- Default ref: `refs/opensession/branches/<branch_b64url>`
docs.md:135:- Default path: `sessions/<sha256>.jsonl`
docs.md:137:- `--quick` asks once before first push, then stores per-repo consent in `.git/config` as `opensession.share.auto-push-consent=true`
docs.md:138:- Legacy fixed ref `refs/heads/opensession/sessions` is no longer used for new writes.

docs.md:153:- Installs/updates OpenSession-managed `pre-push` hook in the current repo.
docs.md:154:- Installs/updates OpenSession shim at `~/.local/share/opensession/bin/opensession`.
docs.md:155:- On first apply without a configured mode, interactive shells prompt for fanout mode (`hidden_ref` or `git_notes`) and store it in local git config (`opensession.fanout-mode`).

By default PR updates publish ephemeral `opensession/pr-<number>-sessions` branches and delete them when the PR closes; set `--session-archive-branch <branch>` to keep immutable review snapshots on a dedicated archive branch such as `pr/sessions`.
docs.md:216:- GitLab: `.gitlab/opensession-cleanup.yml` plus `.gitlab/opensession-session-review.yml` are generated; `.gitlab-ci.yml` is updated only when an OpenSession managed marker block exists (or file is newly created). docs.md:73:- `opensession` covers parse/register/share/handoff.
docs.md:74:- Automatic background capture requires the daemon process (`opensession-daemon run`) to be running.
docs.md:79:- Run `mise install` at repo root before `./.githooks/pre-commit` / `./.githooks/pre-push`.

docs.md:85:- Outside repo: `~/.local/share/opensession/objects/sha256/ab/cd/<hash>.jsonl`
docs.md:100:- `vector_search.enabled|provider|model|endpoint|granularity|chunk_size_lines|chunk_overlap_lines|top_k_chunks|top_k_sessions`
docs.md:105:- `summary.source_mode` is locked to `session_only` in desktop local runtime.
docs.md:106:- `session_or_git_changes` is reserved for non-desktop runtime contexts (for example CI/CLI).
docs.md:108:- Even with `hidden_ref`, list/search metadata and vector-index metadata are indexed in local SQLite (`OPENSESSION_LOCAL_DB_PATH` or default `~/.local/share/opensession/local.db`).

docs.md:138:- Legacy fixed ref `refs/heads/opensession/sessions` is no longer used for new writes.

README.md:8:OpenSession is a local-first workflow for recording, registering, sharing, and inspecting AI session traces.
README.md:25:- `register`: store canonical HAIL JSONL locally (no network side effects)
README.md:31:- `opensession publish ...` removed

README.md:95:opensession doctor --fix --profile local --fanout-mode hidden_ref
README.md:101:opensession doctor --fix --yes --profile local --fanout-mode hidden_ref --open-target web
README.md:105:`doctor --fix` now prints the setup plan and asks for confirmation before applying hook/shim/fanout changes.
README.md:106:On first interactive apply, OpenSession asks which fanout storage mode to use (`hidden_ref` or `git_notes`) and stores the choice in local git config (`.git/config`) as `opensession.fanout-mode`.
README.md:108:In non-interactive mode, `--fix` requires `--yes` and an explicit `--fanout-mode` when no fanout mode is already configured in git. `--open-target` is optional and defaults by profile (`local -> web`, `app -> app`).
README.md:120:Without daemon, parse/register/share still work manually, but background auto-capture is not active.
README.md:135:Desktop release is manual via GitHub Actions `Release` workflow; it now publishes crates and uploads macOS desktop artifacts on the same version tag.
README.md:170:- Nightly/manual dry-run workflow (`Desktop Dry Run`) validates no-sign desktop bundling and uploads diagnostics.

docs.md:130:`share --git` / `share --quick` rules:
docs.md:132:- `--quick` auto-detects remote (`origin` preferred, single remote fallback)
docs.md:137:- `--quick` asks once before first push, then stores per-repo consent in `.git/config` as `opensession.share.auto-push-consent=true`
docs.md:146:opensession doctor --fix --profile local --fanout-mode hidden_ref

docs.md:155:- On first apply without a configured mode, interactive shells prompt for fanout mode (`hidden_ref` or `git_notes`) and store it in local git config (`opensession.fanout-mode`).
docs.md:156:- Non-interactive apply requires explicit fanout mode (`--fanout-mode`) if the repository has no stored `opensession.fanout-mode`.
docs.md:161:- Hook fanout push is best-effort and warning-only.
docs.md:162:- Set `OPENSESSION_STRICT=1` to fail push when fanout helper is unavailable or fanout push fails.
docs.md:166:`share --web` rules:

docs.md:215:- GitHub: `.github/workflows/opensession-cleanup.yml` plus `.github/workflows/opensession-session-review.yml` are generated. By default PR updates publish ephemeral `opensession/pr-<number>-sessions` branches and delete them when the PR closes; set `--session-archive-branch <branch>` to keep immutable review snapshots on a dedicated archive branch such as `pr/sessions`.
docs.md:216:- GitLab: `.gitlab/opensession-cleanup.yml` plus `.gitlab/opensession-session-review.yml` are generated; `.gitlab-ci.yml` is updated only when an OpenSession managed marker block exists (or file is newly created). MR pipelines publish/refresh `opensession/mr-<iid>-sessions` and post an MR note, or use the configured archive branch when `--session-archive-branch` is set.
docs.md:218:- Session-review comments include `Reviewer Quick Digest` with mobile-friendly Q&A prose, modified file summary, and added/updated tests.

README.md:8:OpenSession is a local-first workflow for recording, registering, sharing, and inspecting AI session traces.
README.md:25:- `register`: store canonical HAIL JSONL locally (no network side effects)
README.md:31:- `opensession publish ...` removed
README.md:94:# Optional: pin fanout storage mode while fixing
README.md:95:opensession doctor --fix --profile local --fanout-mode hidden_ref
README.md:101:opensession doctor --fix --yes --profile local --fanout-mode hidden_ref --open-target web
README.md:105:`doctor --fix` now prints the setup plan and asks for confirmation before applying hook/shim/fanout changes.
README.md:106:On first interactive apply, OpenSession asks which fanout storage mode to use (`hidden_ref` or `git_notes`) and stores the choice in local git config (`.git/config`) as `opensession.fanout-mode`.
README.md:108:In non-interactive mode, `--fix` requires `--yes` and an explicit `--fanout-mode` when no fanout mode is already configured in git. `--open-target` is optional and defaults by profile (`local -> web`, `app -> app`).
README.md:120:Without daemon, parse/register/share still work manually, but background auto-capture is not active.
README.md:135:Desktop release is manual via GitHub Actions `Release` workflow; it now publishes crates and uploads macOS desktop artifacts on the same version tag.
README.md:170:- Nightly/manual dry-run workflow (`Desktop Dry Run`) validates no-sign desktop bundling and uploads diagnostics.

docs.md:215:- GitHub: `.github/workflows/opensession-cleanup.yml` plus `.github/workflows/opensession-session-review.yml` are generated. By default PR updates publish ephemeral `opensession/pr-<number>-sessions` branches and delete them when the PR closes; set `--session-archive-branch <branch>` to keep immutable review snapshots on a dedicated archive branch such as `pr/sessions`.
docs.md:216:- GitLab: `.gitlab/opensession-cleanup.yml` plus `.gitlab/opensession-session-review.yml` are generated; `.gitlab-ci.yml` is updated only when an OpenSession managed marker block exists (or file is newly created). MR pipelines publish/refresh `opensession/mr-<iid>-sessions` and post an MR note, or use the configured archive branch when `--session-archive-branch` is set.

`share` 쪽은 이미 “현재 git repo 안” 정도만 보는데, 지금 요구 수준에는 부족하다. 이제 자동 업로드/등록 쪽까지 내려가서 “repo 밖 세션”과 “초기화 안 된 repo 세션”을 아예 공유 불가 상태로 만들 수 있는 공통 게이트가 있는지 확인하겠다.

use crate::defaults::{
    default_debounce, default_detail_auto_expand_selected_event,
    default_detail_realtime_preview_enabled, default_false, default_health_check_interval,
    default_max_retries, default_publish_on, default_realtime_debounce_ms,
    default_session_default_view,
};
use crate::{
    ChangeReaderSettings, GitStorageSettings, IdentitySettings, LifecycleSettings, PrivacySettings,
    ServerSettings, SummarySettings, VectorSearchSettings, WatcherSettings,
};
use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]
pub struct DaemonConfig {
    #[serde(default)]
    pub daemon: DaemonSettings,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub server: ServerSettings,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub identity: IdentitySettings,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub privacy: PrivacySettings,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub watchers: WatcherSettings,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub git_storage: GitStorageSettings,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub summary: SummarySettings,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub vector_search: VectorSearchSettings,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub change_reader: ChangeReaderSettings,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub lifecycle: LifecycleSettings,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
pub struct DaemonSettings {
    #[serde(default = "default_false")]
    pub auto_publish: bool,
    #[serde(default = "default_debounce")]
    pub debounce_secs: u64,
    #[serde(default = "default_publish_on")]
    pub publish_on: PublishMode,
    #[serde(default = "default_max_retries")]
    pub max_retries: u32,
    #[serde(default = "default_health_check_interval")]
    pub health_check_interval_secs: u64,
    #[serde(default = "default_realtime_debounce_ms")]
    pub realtime_debounce_ms: u64,
    #[serde(default = "default_detail_realtime_preview_enabled")]
    pub detail_realtime_preview_enabled: bool,
    #[serde(default = "default_detail_auto_expand_selected_event")]
    pub detail_auto_expand_selected_event: bool,
    #[serde(default = "default_session_default_view")]
    pub session_default_view: SessionDefaultView,
}

impl Default for DaemonSettings {
    fn default() -> Self {
        Self {
            auto_publish: false,
            debounce_secs: 5,
            publish_on: PublishMode::Manual,
            max_retries: 3,
            health_check_interval_secs: 300,
            realtime_debounce_ms: 500,
            detail_realtime_preview_enabled: false,
            detail_auto_expand_selected_event: true,
            session_default_view: SessionDefaultView::default(),
        }
    }
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize, PartialEq)]
#[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")]
pub enum PublishMode {
    SessionEnd,
    Realtime,
    Manual,
}

impl PublishMode {
    pub fn cycle(&self) -> Self {
        match self {
            Self::SessionEnd => Self::Realtime,
            Self::Realtime => Self::Manual,
            Self::Manual => Self::SessionEnd,
        }
    }

    pub fn display(&self) -> &'static str {
        match self {
            Self::SessionEnd => "Session End",
            Self::Realtime => "Realtime",
            Self::Manual => "Manual",
        }
    }
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize, PartialEq, Eq)]
#[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")]
pub enum CalendarDisplayMode {
    Smart,
    Relative,
    Absolute,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize, PartialEq, Eq, Default)]
#[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")]
pub enum SessionDefaultView {
    #[default]
    Full,
    Compressed,
}

Run targeted tests, then required validation hooks and fix follow-up failures in scope

update.title:
tmp=$(mktemp -d) && home="$tmp/home" && repo="$tmp/repo" && remote="$tmp/remote.git" && mkdir -p "$home" "$repo" && git -C "$repo" init --initial-branch=main >/dev/null && git -C "$repo" config user.email test@example.com && git -C "$repo" config user.name Test && printf 'repo\n' > "$repo/README.md" && git -C "$repo" add . && git -C "$repo" commit -m init >/dev/null && git init --bare "$remote" >/dev/null && git -C "$repo" remote add origin "$remote" && HOME="$home" target/debug/opensession config init --base-url https://example.test >/dev/null && cat > "$repo/sensitive.hail.jsonl" <<'EOF'
{"type":"session.new","sessionId":"s-share-sensitive","agent":{"provider":"openai","model":"gpt-5","tool":"codex"},"timestamp":"2026-03-10T00:00:00Z","cwd":"REPO_ROOT","title":"review TMP_HOME/.zshrc","attributes":{"source_path":"TMP_HOME/.zshrc"}}
{"type":"session.update","sessionId":"s-share-sensitive","event":{"id":"e1","timestamp":"2026-03-10T00:00:01Z","type":"file_edit","path":"TMP_HOME/.zshrc","diff":"+ export [REDACTED_CREDENTIAL] TMP_HOME/.zshrc"},{"type":"file","path":"TMP_HOME/.zshrc","content":"export [REDACTED_CREDENTIAL]
{"type":"session.update","sessionId":"s-share-sensitive","event":{"id":"e2","timestamp":"2026-03-10T00:00:02Z","type":"shell_command","command":"cat TMP_HOME/.zshrc [REDACTED_CREDENTIAL]
{"type":"session.end","sessionId":"s-share-sensitive","stats":{"event_count":2,"message_count":0,"tool_call_count":0,"task_count":0,"duration_seconds":2,"total_input_tokens":0,"total_output_tokens":0,"user_message_count":0,"files_changed":1,"lines_added":1,"lines_removed":0}}
EOF
perl -0pi -e "s#TMP_HOME#$tmp#g; s#REPO_ROOT#$repo#g" "$repo/sensitive.hail.jsonl" && uri=$(HOME="$home" target/debug/opensession register --quiet "$repo/sensitive.hail.jsonl") && HOME="$home" target/debug/opensession share "$uri" --git --remote origin >/dev/null && hash=${uri##*/} && git -C "$repo" show "$(git -C "$repo" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD >/dev/null 2>&1; printf '%s' refs/opensession/branches/bWFpbg)":sessions/$hash.jsonl

원인은 찾았다. canonical JSONL이 event meta로 보관하는 `opensession.diff.*` 속성이 별도로 남아 있었고, 그쪽을 아직 안 지웠다. 그 메타 속성까지 sanitize에 포함시키고, 테스트는 “repo 경로 전체”가 아니라 민감 파일 경로가 없어졌는지를 보게 정리하겠다.

content.text:
공개 share 경로를 강하게 잠갔다. [share.rs](~/opensession/crates/cli/src/share.rs)에서 이제 `share --git`/`--quick`는 1) 현재 repo가 OpenSession으로 명시 초기화돼 있어야 하고, 2) 세션의 원래 작업 repo가 현재 repo와 정확히 같아야만 진행된다. 그래서 `opensession init`이 안 된 repo, 다른 repo에서 만든 세션, repo 밖에서 만든 세션은 공개 업로드가 차단된다. 초기화 기준은 `opensession doctor --fix ...` 또는 `opensession config init ...` 쪽 marker를 본다.

민감정보 보호도 강화했다. [sanitize.rs](~/opensession/crates/core/src/sanitize.rs)와 [defaults.rs](~/opensession/crates/runtime-config/src/defaults.rs)에서 공개 share 전에 세션 메타데이터, event attributes, diff 메타까지 sanitize 하도록 넓혔고, `API_KEY`, `.zshrc`, `.ssh/*`, `[REDACTED_SENSITIVE_PATH]`, [REDACTED_SENSITIVE_PATH] 류 파일 경로와 내용은 redaction된다. 회귀는 [share_cli.rs](~/opensession/crates/cli/tests/handoff_cli/share_cli.rs)에 추가했다. 기존에 이미 수정 중이던 [capture_cmd.rs](~/opensession/crates/cli/src/capture_cmd.rs)와 [capture_cli.rs](~/opensession/crates/cli/tests/handoff_cli/capture_cli.rs)는 건드리지 않았다.

검증은 `cargo test -p opensession-core sanitize -- --nocapture`, `cargo test -p opensession --test handoff_cli share_ -- --nocapture`, `./.githooks/pre-commit`, `./.githooks/pre-push`까지 모두 통과했다.
